creator: ohauer@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Lars,

I've shaped a patch against upstream git repo, + some additional fixes.
- drop pkg-install.in /pkg-deinstall.in
- handle directory permissions in pkg-plist

The patch should work for nagios and icinga.
http://people.freebsd.org/~ohauer/diffs/pnp-0.6.24.diff
